refnamediv.refpurpose: Run several DNN output layers with one preprocessing configuration.

refsynopsisdiv.title: Syntax
refsynopsisdiv.synopsis: [outputs, names] = dnn_forward_outputs(net, image, preset) [outputs, names] = dnn_forward_outputs(net, image, preset, output_names)

listitem.para: A DNN object returned by dnn_readmodel.
A named or structure-based preprocessing preset accepted by dnn_forward_preset.
Optional non-empty string matrix of layer names. When omitted, OpenCV unconnected output names are used.
A list of output tensors in the same order as names.

refsection.title: Description
refsection.para: dnn_forward_outputs provides a stable multiple-output wrapper around dnn_forward. It returns a list instead of a structure because OpenCV layer names may contain characters that are inconvenient as Scilab field names.

refsection.title: Examples
